post.description: Authenticates a user and returns access/refresh tokens
Issues a new access token using a valid refresh token
Creates a new user account and returns access/refresh tokens

get.description: Returns all boards in a sprint with pagination

post.description: Creates a new board in a sprint

patch.description: Reorder boards within a sprint (positions determined by array order)

get.description: Returns a single board by ID
Returns all columns in a board with pagination

post.description: Creates a new column in a board (position is auto-calculated)

delete.description: Deletes a column from a board

patch.description: Updates column name (use reorder endpoint for position changes)

get.description: Returns paginated organisations with optional filtering and sorting
Returns a single organisation by ID
Returns paginated members of an organisation with optional filtering

post.description: Adds a user to an organisation with a given role
post.summary: Add a member to an organisation

delete.description: Delete a user from an organisation
delete.summary: Delete a member from an organsiation

patch.description: Updates the role of a member within an organisation

get.description: Returns paginated projects in an organisation with optional filtering

post.description: Creates a new project in an organisation

get.description: Returns a single project by ID

patch.description: Updates a project's name and description

get.description: Returns paginated sprints in a project with optional filtering

post.description: Creates a new sprint in a project

get.description: Returns a single sprint by ID

post.description: Transitions a sprint to completed status
Transitions a sprint to active status

get.description: Returns paginated tickets for a project, optionally filtered by sprint or board

post.description: Creates a new ticket in a project

get.description: Returns a single ticket by ID

patch.description: Updates ticket details (title, description, priority, type, etc.)
Moves a ticket to a specific board column
Moves a ticket to a specific board and column
Moves a ticket to a specific sprint
